## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (corrects an existing issue)
- [ ] New feature (adds new functionality)
- [ ] Skill improvement (better prompts, scoring, or recommendations)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Installer or configuration change

## Skills Affected

Which skills does this change touch? List them here so we know what to test.

## Testing

- [ ] Tested the affected skill(s) against a real repository
- [ ] Verified no regressions in other skills
- [ ] Checked that installed copies match source (`install.sh` / `install.ps1`)

## Checklist

- [ ] No credentials, API keys, or `.env` files included
- [ ] Skill files follow the Agent Skills open standard
- [ ] Reference files have updated `<!-- Updated: YYYY-MM-DD -->` comment
